top_signals.title: New Zealand Dollar Faces Tough Third Quarter on Growth Headwinds
top_signals.summary: New Zealand’s dollar is facing a subdued third quarter as a resurgent greenback and the lingering effects of the Iran war’s energy shock drag on the domestic recovery.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran talks on hold after fighting breaks out and Trump once again threatens annihilation
top_signals.summary: Iran says it targeted U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain following U.S. strikes on targets in and around the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
